compounds.frequency: twice a week, escalated to every 6 days at 1mg

benefits.description: Lost 14kg over 17 weeks, targeting final 4kg to reach goal weight

side_effects.description: Some sensitivity to dose increases; user is self-described as very sensitive

protocol_notes: Started at 0.25mg twice weekly, increased to 0.5mg twice weekly after 2-3 weeks, then to 1mg every 6 days by week 4. Currently at 4.0mg per week after 17 weeks. User emphasizes starting low and titrating slowly based on individual response. Prioritizes protein intake.
